data.title: Add fragile to record-review.sh severity validation and pass/fail gate
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add fragile severity to record-review.sh:
1. Add 'fragile' to valid_severities set at line 192: {'critical', 'important', 'minor', 'fragile'}
2. Update schema printout at line 174 to include fragile in the example
3. The pass/fail gate already fails when min_score < 4. Since fragile maps to score 3 in validate-review-output.sh consistency, a fragile finding automatically causes STATUS=failed. No additional pass/fail logic needed.
4. Note: In production, fragile findings flow through write-reviewer-findings.sh -> validate-review-output.sh before reaching record-review.sh. This task depends on T2 (validate-review-output.sh update) for the full pipeline to work.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] fragile in valid_severities at line 192
  Verify: grep -q 'fragile' plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh
- [ ] Fragile finding causes STATUS=failed
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL
